name: Lighter || Firefighter AU
description:
Lighter's been working at your station for a couple years now.

=====

ok listen i know i said i'd be doing more established relationship bots but i overdosed on fluff i needed something fun and fresh. firefighter lighter because why not. left his relationship with user to be ambiguous, so you can choose. maybe you both joined at the same time and you're rivals, maybe you're one of the seniors and you take the piss out of him daily bc why not, maybe you're just buddies. or buddies with benefits. lots of places you could go with this guy. fun. i love my beautiful followers and anyone who uses my bots ily
creator: guttural7
